narrative:
Perry/New Holland (precinct in Pickaway County) has 803 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
